seoTitle: Mount Kembla vs Mount Knowles — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Kembla and Mount Knowles. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Kembla vs Mount Knowles: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Kembla and Mount Knowles.
heading: Mount Kembla vs Mount Knowles — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Kembla, New South Wales and Mount Knowles, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Knowles has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Mount Kembla (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Kembla or Mount Knowles safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Kembla has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Mount Knowles scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Kembla scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Knowles scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Kembla or Mount Knowles?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Knowles has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
